transcript:
(410) 497-4298: If you record your name and reason for calling, I'll see if this person is available.
Jack Davis: Jack with Einstein Moving Company.
(410) 497-4298: Thanks, please stay on the line.
(410) 497-4298: Hello.
Jack Davis: Hey, this is Jack with Einstein Moving Company. Is this Jay?
(410) 497-4298: Yes, this is Jack, here.
Jack Davis: Hey there, I saw you submitted some information online about a move is now a good time to talk?
(410) 497-4298: Yeah.
Jack Davis: Cool. I see that you marked first thing. I see you've marked help with packing were you needing us to come in and, and box everything up, you know, pack in the boxes, where were you just referring to like wrapping and disassembling of the furniture.
(410) 497-4298: I'm just wrapping and, and take, take taking the furniture out. Yeah.
Jack Davis: Cool.
Jack Davis: That's part of our typical moving process we'll wrap everything and disassemble and reassemble it for you. So as long as you have everything boxed up and ready for us, we'll be able to just do the moving.
(410) 497-4298: Okay, that sounds good.
Jack Davis: Cool. It looks like we're doing a, I see a 1700 square foot house but then it's going to a much smaller townhome. Are we moving the entire home? Or is this more like a, a partial move? What's, what are we, what are we doing?
(410) 497-4298: Yeah, yeah, this is the in a tire move. I don't have a lot of stuff in my house. I mean I just have like a TV stand, a, a couple of table and the bed frame guy I need to move. So it's about, I would say it's about like a two bedrooms, a house, the move and I'm moving that to like a, yeah, mm-hmm.
Jack Davis: Mm-hmm.
Jack Davis: Okay. Is there two, is there two bedroom sets?
(410) 497-4298: No, no. So there's only 11 bed bedroom set and there's like a couch in the living room. There's a dining table, there's a couple chairs. There's a, yeah, I mean, it's just, just, just, just, just one bedroom, so.
Jack Davis: No.
Jack Davis: Okay, cool. Let me no, that makes sense. So yeah, I can see you know, obviously a little bit more stuff than a one bedroom apartment, cause they're house but there's not two bedroom sets which makes things easy, cool and.
(410) 497-4298: Mm-hmm.
Jack Davis: Alright. Any special consideration items, anything that's like super, you know, you know, fragile delicate in the air, looms. Anything like that.
(410) 497-4298: No, there might be like a grill that I want to bring like, a small grill like a gas grill that's in the backyard, but I don't know that I think that's ops it.
Jack Davis: As long as all the propane is removed, we can do that for you. We just can't transport the fuel.
(410) 497-4298: Okay. Yeah, I can remove the propane then.
Jack Davis: Okay.
(410) 497-4298: Yeah, and then I yeah, I think that's pretty much it. Can, could, could you, could you tell me the rates and, and what that looks like?
Jack Davis: Cool.
Jack Davis: Yeah, so the way that our pricing works basically we charge, we charge $105 an hour per mover. So this will be a two mover team, so that'd be a $210 hourly rate included in that hourly rate. We will wrap everything and blankets and shrink wrap we will take apart the bed frame, put it back together anything else with the disassemble or reassembly is all included. The only additional cost whatsoever is a one time $75 travel fee, and that's just to return our truck from that final address. The other than that travel fee there's no additional costs, it is just the time that it takes for us to move that time starts when we arrive and start moving that time stops once we have delivered and set up everything at the new place, one bedroom apartments normally take about three to four hours.
Jack Davis: A little bit. Plus a little bit of a drive. I kind of have about five hours estimated for you I do think it'll go pretty quick but there's still a 37 minute drive and then, that would give us roughly about two hours, 23 hours to load up and then an hour or two to get everything unloaded for you. Ultimately it is just time there is a two and a half hour minimum. So, if it is super easy and we're able to finish it in two and a half hours or less you'd be at the minimum of $600 once we go past that minimum it is prorated fifteen minutes at a time. So you just pay every quarter hour as the move goes on. So, if we were to pay you say finish four hours that's how much you pay for if we were to take the entire five hours. Then you'd be looking at an estimated total of $1,125 but again it is all just based on, on the time spent.
(410) 497-4298: Okay. Will you be able to send me the these quotes?
Jack Davis: Yes, I'll go ahead and send this to you via email. And then if you do wanna move forward, all you need to do is respond to that email and say let's do it, let's book it. I will let you know we only have one spot left on Friday the twenty sixth so it's going quick. The sooner you let us know the better chance that'll still be available for you and, and we can, you know get that set for you. There's no deposit and there's no cancellation fees if you ever changed mind.
(410) 497-4298: Okay, thank you.
Jack Davis: Thank you, have a good one.
(410) 497-4298: Yup, alright, you too.
